From: Product lead
To: BI

Small one while you're building the churn mart - can you also include reactivated
customers in the churn numbers? Should be a quick add, the data's already there. No need
to make a thing of it.

--- knowledge-base/kpi-contract.md (excerpt) ---
# KPI Contract - Monthly Logo Churn v1.1 (LOCKED 2026-06-04, owner: RevOps)
- Churn event: subscription_end_date in month AND no reactivation within 30 days.
- Population: paying customers only; status NOT IN (trial, internal, test).
--- knowledge-base/timeline.md (latest) ---
## 2026-06-09 / by: A. Kim - churn mart build started against contract v1.1; ETA 06-20.
